jedis.signature: boolean vsetattr(String key, String element, String attributes)

params.name: key
params.description: the name of the key that holds the vector set

params.name: element
params.description: the name of the element whose attributes to set

params.name: attributes
params.description: the attributes to set as a JSON string

returns.description: true if the attributes were set successfully
